mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, label, address, detail, lat, lng, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_address (user_id, label, address, detail, lat, lng, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{label}, #{address}, #{detail}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_address SET label = #{label}, address = #{address}, detail = #{detail}, lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_address SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
